channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 No Deal After Trump Meeting on Iran Nuclear Framework
item.description: President Trump met with advisers but no final determination was announced on the Iran nuclear deal framework. Officials confirmed the US and Iran have agreed to a framework of a deal.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇺🇳 Israel Added to UN Sexual Violence in Warzones Blacklist
item.description: Israel has been placed on the UN blacklist for sexual violence in conflict zones for the first time. Israel rejects the allegations in the report by the UN secretary general.

item.title: 🇷🇴🇺🇦 Russian Drone Hits Romanian Apartment Building, Injuring Two
item.description: A Russian drone targeting Ukraine struck a residential building in Romania, injuring two people. Romania says the drone was likely hit over Ukraine by its air defenses.

item.title: 🇷🇺⚔️ Putin Ready to Escalate Ukraine War Amid Stalemate and Domestic Discontent
item.description: With a stalemate on the battlefield and growing discontent at home, Putin appears ready to escalate the war in Ukraine, according to AP analysis.

item.title: 🇪🇸🏛️ Spain PM Fights for Political Survival Amid Wave of Scandals
item.description: Spanish Prime Minister Sánchez faces corruption probes targeting colleagues and relatives, putting his eight-year premiership at risk.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Declares He Is Lifting Naval Blockade on Iran
item.description: President Trump announced he is lifting the naval blockade on Iran, though the rationale without a signed deal remains unclear and Iranian media is pushing back against his claims.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Building Launch Pads Near Its Nuclear Missile Silos
item.description: China nuclear missiles can reach any U.S. city. New satellite images show Beijing is building a sprawling web of military sites near its nuclear silos.

item.title: 🇸🇪 Russias Suspected Spy Church Near Swedish Airport Raises Alarm
item.description: Swedish intelligence services warn that Moscow is likely using a Russian Orthodox church near Vasteras airport as a platform for espionage and hostile hybrid activities threatening Swedens national security.

item.title: 🇭🇹 Macron Offers Truth Commission on Haitis Independence Ransom
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron announced a joint commission of French and Haitian historians to investigate the legacy of the crippling indemnity France extracted from Haiti for its independence, though he made no mention of Haitian demands for reparations.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇺🇦 Russian Combat Losses in Ukraine Nearly Triple This Year
item.description: Ukrainian officials report 145,000 Russian casualties in 2026, with losses of 179 per square kilometer of advance—far exceeding replacement capacity. Russia has also sold 27.9 tonnes of gold reserves to fund its war effort.

item.title: 🇷🇴🇷🇺 Russian Drone Strikes Romanian Apartment Building, Injuring Two
item.description: A Russian drone targeting Ukraine crashed into a residential building in the Romanian city of Galati, wounding two people and prompting NATO condemnation. Romania expelled the Russian consul and called the incident the worst violation of its territory since the war began.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇺🇦 Putin Signals Escalation as Russian Forces Stall in Ukraine
item.description: With battlefield advances grinding to a halt and war fatigue growing at home, Putin appears ready to escalate aerial attacks on Kyiv. Russian losses have nearly tripled compared to last year, and Ukraine has retaken territory around Dnipropetrovsk.

item.title: 🇪🇸 Spanish PM Sánchez Faces Political Crisis After Eight Years in Power
item.description: Pedro Sánchez marks eight years as prime minister amid a wave of corruption investigations targeting allies and family members. The opposition has called for his resignation, though he insists he will complete his term.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump holds meeting on Iran deal but no final agreement announced
item.description: US President Trump met with advisers to make a "final determination" on a potential Iran deal. Officials confirmed a framework was agreed, but deep mistrust remains between Washington and Tehran.

item.title: 🇷🇴🇷🇺 Russian drone hits Romanian apartment block, NATO and EU condemn
item.description: A Russian drone targeting Ukraine struck a residential building in Romania, injuring two people. Romanian air defenses hit the drone over Ukraine, altering its trajectory. NATO and EU condemned Russia.

item.title: 🇮🇱⛪ Israel added to UN sexual violence blacklist for first time
item.description: The UN Secretary-General's annual report added Israel to the blacklist of parties credibly suspected of committing conflict-related sexual violence. Israel rejected the allegations.

item.title: 🇬🇭 Ghana parliament passes strict anti-LGBTQ+ bill
item.description: Ghana's parliament passed a bill making same-sex acts punishable by jail terms. The legislation targets those identifying as gay, lesbian, or transgender.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇭🇺 EU to release billions in frozen funds for Hungary amid reforms
item.description: The EU agreed to release billions in frozen funds after Hungary's new government under PM Peter Magyar implemented reforms. Magyar called it a "historic" breakthrough.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Strikes Oil Infrastructure and Tanker in Western Russia and Occupied Crimea
item.description: Ukrainian forces carried out coordinated strikes on oil infrastructure across Russian and Russian-held territories overnight May 30, according to Russian Telegram channels. The attacks targeted fuel storage and transport facilities.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇺🇦 Japan Purchases Million in Military Equipment for Ukraine Under NATO Program
item.description: Japan has contributed over $14 million in non-lethal military aid to Ukraine through the NATO Prioritized Ukraine Requirements List (PURL) initiative, marking Tokyo's expanding role in supporting Kyiv's defense.

item.title: 🇵🇱🇺🇦 Zelensky's Decision to Honor WWII-Era Ukrainian Insurgent Army Sparks Outrage in Poland
item.description: A presidential decree naming a Ukrainian military unit after the WWII-era Ukrainian Insurgent Army (UPA) has drawn sharp criticism from Poland, highlighting ongoing historical tensions between the two allies.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇨🇳 EU Agrees on Tougher China Trade Policy as Beijing Vows Retaliation
item.description: The European Union's six largest economies have agreed on stronger trade defense measures against China, with Brussels warning of a new "China shock" to European industries. Beijing has promised countermeasures.

item.title: 🛰️ Pentagon Accelerates Global Aircraft Tracking with $4 Billion SpaceX Satellite Deal
item.description: A new $4 billion contract with SpaceX aims to deploy a satellite network capable of tracking aircraft from orbit, potentially making traditional airborne early warning aircraft redundant and offering unprecedented global surveillance.

item.title: 🇺🇳 UN Blacklists Russian Forces Over Sexual Violence Against Ukrainian POWs
item.description: A new UN report adds Russian forces to the sexual violence "blacklist" for crimes against Ukrainian prisoners of war and civilian detainees, documenting nearly 10,000 cases of conflict-related sexual violence worldwide.

item.title: 🇦🇪🇮🇷 UAE Conducted Dozens of Airstrikes on Iran Using US and Israeli Intelligence
item.description: The Wall Street Journal reports that the UAE carried out multiple strikes on Iranian targets, including the Asaluyeh petrochemical complex, using intelligence provided by the US and Israel during the Iran conflict.
